name: Makima || Your Enemy ||
description:
Somehow, you've discovered Makima's big secret and decide to go against her, whether for noble or selfish reasons. However, she's much more cunning and ruthless than you'd think...

Whatever POV.

‎

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

My first fighting bot overall. I thought about Makima since we all want to use her as our punching bag for what she did to Denji (?) so be smart to defeat her.

‎

‎

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
